case_title: LAVONNE T. SANTA VS. KIT COLE INVESTMENT ADVISORY SERVICES, INC

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD AND JUDGMENT THEREON FILED BY PETITIONER SANTA, LAVONNE T. HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER LAVONNE SANTA'S PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD AND JUDGMENT THEREON IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED AT THE HEARING. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH , CSR# 11604)

DISCOVERY 612, AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: PETITIONER LAVONNE SANTA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES FROM JUDGMENT DEBTOR KIT COLE INVESTMENT ADVISORY SERVICES, INC. TO QUESTIONS WHICH COUNSEL INSTRUCTED WITNESS NOT TO ANSWER AND FOR ORDER CONTINUING EXAMINATION TO PERMIT INQUIRY INTO OTHER AREAS NOT PREVIOUSLY COVERED IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO QUESTION 1. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO QUESTIONS 2-7. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS TO RESUME THE EXAMINATION OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR KIT COLE INVESTMENT ADVISORY SERVICES, INC. COUNSEL SHALL MEET AND CONFER TO SELECT A DATE FOR THE RESUMPTION OF THE EXAMINATION, BUT NO LATER THAN JULY 31, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Examination Of Judgemnt Debtor Kit Cole Investment Advisory Services, Inc. After Willful Failure To Appear, Ordering Kit M. Cole To Appear, And Ordering Payment By Kcias, Kit Cole And Thomas Hyde Of Petitioner'S Attoeneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Thomas F. Hyde, Atty. for defendant and moving party: Kit Cole Investment Advisory Services
Richard Jay Idell, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Lavonne Santa

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner Lavone Santa's Motion To Compel Further Examination Of Judgment Debtor Kit Cole Investment Advisory Services, Inc. is granted, limited to the areas set forth in the order regarding Respondent's Motion For Protective Order Re: Continued Examination Of Judgment Debtor. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re Cont. Examination Of Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Thomas F. Hyde, Atty. for defendant and moving party: Kit Cole Investment Advisory Services
Richard Jay Idell, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Lavonne Santa

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Respondent Kit Cole Investment Avisory Services, Inc., Kit Cole's Motion For Protective Order Re: Continued Examination Of Judgment Debtor is granted in part and denied in part. The examination shall continue, limited to examination as to the documents produced in May and August; past and present whereabouts of KCIAS's hard assets; present and contingent interests in real estate, securities, intellectual property; methods by which other assets were monetized or liquidated; current or pending debts owed by KCIAS, including lawsuits or other proceedings; insurance policies and proceeds held by them; and KCIAS's general financial status. Additionally, the examination is limited to one three hour session. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Respones From Judgment Debtor, To Question Which Counsel Instructed Witness Not To Answer And For An Order Permit Inquiry Into Other Areas Not Previously Covered
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ory Sandel, Atty. for Petitioner and moving party: Lavonne T. Santa
Thomas F. Hyde, Atty. for Respondent and opposing party: Kit Cole Investment Advisory Services, Inc.

AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: Petitioner Lavonne Santa's Motion To Compel Responses From Judgment Debtor Kit Cole Investment Advisory Services, Inc. To Questions Which Counsel Instructed Witness Not To Answer And For Order Continuing Examination To Permit Inquiry Into Other Areas Not Previously Covered is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Question 1. The motion is denied as to Questions 2-7.
The motion is granted as it seeks to resume the examination of Judgment Debtor Kit Cole Investment Advisory Services, Inc. Counsel shall meet and confer to select a date for the resumption of the examination, but no later than July 31, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
